text: DA14531MOD-based P531 handheld wand and companion SmartDevice application
DEVICE_INFO_SET, PPFD calibration index 6, averaging limits, six wavelength channels, recovery/update flow, flash diagnostic logging, and MTU67 write support with 20-byte TX notification fragments

As-built scope: this document describes the current target branch implementation. Reserved commands/events from earlier drafts are omitted unless implemented. Image update regression is handled separately from normal ICD regression because full image transfer is slow.
Use full command set in this document.
Minimal recovery firmware is running and ready for image update.
Use PING, GET_INFO, IMAGE_BEGIN, IMAGE_DATA, IMAGE_END, and REBOOT. Other opcodes may return UNKNOWN_OPCODE.
b0 FragStart reserved, b1 FragCont reserved, b2 Resp, b3 AckReq reserved.
SmartDevice-selected sequence value. Responses echo this value.
Payload length in bytes. Response payloads include RET as byte 0.
Command-specific payload. Requests do not include RET. Responses always begin with RET.
Opcode not implemented in the current advertised state.
Payload length or field value invalid.
Required state is missing, for example peripheral power is off before START_MEAS.
Valid field not supported by this build.
SERIAL/HW_REV come from provisioned flash identity.
Sets handheld time base used by status/log timestamps.
Must be ON before START_MEAS. Logs power transitions.
Commits pending verified image before reset.
Target-board wake validation deferred; dev-board wake is not authoritative.
Only MODE=0 ONESHOT implemented. Requires peripheral power ON.
Returns up to 5 compact log records per request.
Erases the log sector and resets log count to 0.
NVM commit. Current local returns: 0 OK, 1 bad len/not found, 2 flash/bounds error.
Preferred compact: TYPE:u8, SIZE:u32, VER[3], CRC32:u32. Legacy accepted: TYPE:u8, COMPRESS:u8, SIZE:u32, VER[3], CRC32:u32

Chunk data. BYTES <= available ICD request payload and <=255. With ATT_MTU 23, use <=12 data bytes per IMAGE_DATA frame. With negotiated ATT_MTU 67, current firmware supports up to 53 data bytes per IMAGE_DATA frame.
VERIFY: 0 OK, 1 size mismatch, 2 CRC mismatch, 3 other. REBOOT required to run new image.
Only W_IDX 0..5. W_IDX 6 is PPFD and is rejected.
Reads stored current for physical LED index.
Unix time if SET_TIME has been called; otherwise uptime-derived seconds.
Only 0=ONESHOT implemented. Other values return BAD_PARAM.
Set to 1 for current ONESHOT flow. Parsed for payload shape compatibility.
Must be >=200. Used for host pacing compatibility.
Allowed: 0, 1, 2, 4, 8, 16. 0 is treated as 1. Averaging applies only to ADC-derived fields.
Current handheld time. Firmware member name is ts_ms, but value is seconds.
PPFD photodiode ADC millivolts. SmartDevice maps mV to PPFD using CAL W_IDX=6.
Physical LED reflectance channels use indices 0..5; remaining entries are reserved/zero.
b0 indicates target hardware measurement backend failure.
START_MEAS state rule: SmartDevice must send SET_PERIPH_POWER=1 before START_MEAS. If peripheral power is off, START_MEAS returns NOT_READY and records a MEAS_REJECT_POWER diagnostic log entry.
PPFD two-point mV-to-PPFD calibration. LED_CUR_SET rejects this index.
Measured PPFD photodiode mV at point 1
Measured PPFD photodiode mV at point 2
Stage-1 boot manager, DA14531 bootable format.
Production application slot. IMAGE_* writes here.
Reserved log region; current logger uses first 4 KB.
Calibration, LED currents, hardware revision, serial.

Failed update expectation: if production cannot run, the boot manager should fall back to the recovery application. The SmartDevice should scan for P531-Recovery, connect, use GET_INFO to confirm RECOVERY_MODE=1, then repeat IMAGE_BEGIN/DATA/END and REBOOT. Recovery GET_INFO returns the normal first 13 bytes plus MODE:u8, FLAGS:u16, UPTIME_MS:u32, RSSI:i8 fields.
Supported; 24-byte response includes recovery mode and flags.
Supported; commits pending verified image then resets.
